text:
Data Source (MMLEADS) 2.0 suite of files combines Medicare and Medicaid enrollment and claims data into four annual beneficiary-level files. The files include beneficiaries who are Medicare-only, Medicare-Medicaid dually enrolled and Medicaid-only blind and disabled.

Source data
Medicare: FFS, PDE and MA
Medicaid: MAX data
What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Eligibility, enrollment variables
Aggregated cost and use
Medicare: FFS, PDE includes FFS and MA
Medicaid: FFS, managed
